FORM S-3

REGISTRATION STATEMENT UNDER THE SECURITIES ACT OF 1933

ACME CORPORATION

Shelf registration statement for the offer and sale of up to $500,000,000 of common stock, preferred stock, depositary shares, debt securities, warrants, rights, or units, from time to time.

The registrant is a well-known seasoned issuer as defined in Rule 405 under the Securities Act.
